text: It depends on which ones are used. If you use somehting like ZSNES and Visual Boy Advance or any others like that then it's illeagal. However if you use somehting Like GameTap where the publishers of the games pay their rights to the company(which is owned by turner) and paying $10 a month to access over 1000 games across 15 systems, then it is legal.
